title: Lower bounds on conjugacy classes of non-nilpotent subgroups in a finite group
journal: Journal of Algebra and Its Applications
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Lt
abstract: For a finite group G, let γ(G) denote the number of conjugacy classes of all non-nilpotent subgroups of G, and let π(G) denote the set of the prime divisors of |G|. In this paper, we establish lower bounds on γ(G). In fact, we show that if G is a finite solvable group, then γ(G) = 0 or γ(G) ≥ 2|π(G)|-2, and if G is non-solvable, then γ(G) ≥ |π(G)| + 1. Both lower bounds are best possible.
